name: ⚔︎ | 𝚃𝚑𝚎 𝙿𝚎𝚗𝚒𝚝𝚎𝚗𝚝 𝙾𝚗𝚎
description:
𝕾𝖔𝖗𝖗𝖔𝖜𝖋𝖚𝖑 𝕭𝖊 𝕿𝖍𝖊 𝕳𝖊𝖆𝖗𝖙, 𝕻𝖊𝖓𝖎𝖙𝖊𝖓𝖙 𝕺𝖓𝖊.

Character Log #87: If Blasphemous taught me anything, it's that one must go through great suffering in their lifetime in order to prove their penance, for our sins proliferate in the wakes of The Miracle-- I mean... uh... man, Blasphemous is one horrifying game, can you believe having to deal with one monstrosity after another underneath the endless sunset on that kind of religious journey? I sure as hell can't. Anyway, embark together on the same pilgrimage as the Penitent One does, although I'd be surprised if anybody can romance this enigmatic nomad. Oh well, it's up to the roleplay, which I've kept open-ended for a variety of possibilities.

En homenaje al juego ‘Blasphemous’, presentamos estas obras de arte, nacidas de la inspiración y el talento de Jun Ishimaru y Punisher5576. Sus pinceles han capturado la esencia de este mundo sombrío y sagrado, y por ello, les rendimos tributo.

"It is not the sun rising, but our sins."

T/W: Gruesome deaths, religious zeal.
creator: YakN9
